mapper.select: SELECT dispatch_id, driver_id, vehicle_id, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM dispatch_date) * 1000 AS dispatch_date, shift, status, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM created_at) * 1000 AS created_at, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM updated_at) * 1000 AS updated_at, updated_by FROM hd_dispatch ORDER BY dispatch_date DESC, created_at DESC

SELECT dispatch_id, driver_id, vehicle_id, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM dispatch_date) * 1000 AS dispatch_date, shift, status, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM created_at) * 1000 AS created_at, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM updated_at) * 1000 AS updated_at, updated_by FROM hd_dispatch WHERE dispatch_id = #{dispatchId}
mapper.update: UPDATE hd_dispatch SET driver_id = #{driverId}, vehicle_id = #{vehicleId}, dispatch_date = to_timestamp(#{dispatchDate} / 1000.0), shift = #{shift}, status = #{status}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE dispatch_id = #{dispatchId}
